sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68924" key="mousoxarh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουσο-χᾰρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n68924.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">delighting in the Muses</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in poetry</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βίοτος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.411</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maec.</author> </bibl>); <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουσόχορος</orth> is prob. <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. for</abbr> -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χαρής</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).214</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
